hero.badge: NRA-ready from day one · Built to NAS standards
hero.sub: Smart Data Management is a complete cloud platform for accounting, invoicing and financial management — built specifically for Bulgaria's National Accounting Standards.
hero.nocredit: No credit card · No installation · Full access from day one

feat.title: Everything you need for your accounting
feat.sub: Every module works together in a unified workspace. Less manual work, full real-time transparency.

1.title: Invoicing & Payments
1.desc: Invoices and pro forma invoices in seconds. Automatic numbering, correct VAT, direct link to the accounting journal. No double-entry.

2.title: Receivables & Payables
2.desc: Track overdue balances, manage due dates. See who owes what and when — no Excel. Automatic marking of overdue items.

3.title: General Ledger & Chart of Accounts
3.desc: Full double-entry bookkeeping with a configurable chart of accounts aligned to NAS. Every transaction posts automatically.

4.title: Bank & Cash
4.desc: Upload bank statements and the system matches transactions to recorded operations. Multiple bank accounts — one workspace.

5.title: VAT Reporting
5.desc: Automatic VAT journals. VAT return and VIES declaration ready for the NRA. No manual input.

6.title: Administrative Console
6.desc: Manage multiple companies with roles, permissions and financial years. Switch between clients without logging out. Full audit trail.

why.title: Why Smart Data Management?
why.sub: The market is split between outdated desktop systems and international tools not adapted for local compliance. SDM fills exactly that gap.

1.title: Built by accountants for accountants
1.desc: The chart of accounts follows NAS. VAT journals are in the correct NRA format. VIES is built in. None of this requires configuration.

2.title: Every company's data is fully isolated
2.desc: Each company in a fully separate workspace — own chart of accounts, own journals. The client sees only their own company.

3.title: Scale without scaling costs
3.desc: Competitors charge per user or per company. SDM's Business plan is a fixed monthly fee for unlimited client firms.

4.title: Multi-currency operations
4.desc: Support for BGN, EUR and any other currency. Configurable chart of accounts to NAS, IFRS or a custom structure.

5.title: From invoice to general ledger — automatically
5.desc: Every issued invoice posts directly to the sales journal and general ledger. No export, no import, no data loss.

6.title: EU cloud with full audit traceability
6.desc: No installation. No backups. EU data infrastructure, GDPR compliant. Every action recorded with user, time and IP.

who.title: Who is Smart Data Management for?

1.title: Accounting Firms
1.desc: Manage your entire client portfolio from a single login. Each client gets an isolated workspace. The Business plan is designed around how accounting firms actually work: multiple companies, fast month-end closing, predictable cost.

2.title: Small & Medium Businesses
2.desc: Whether you issue ten or one hundred invoices a month, SDM gives you clean, compliant accounting without unnecessary complexity. Your accountant works in the same system — no files back and forth.

3.title: Corporations & Public Administration
3.desc: Complex structures requiring ERP integration and strict compliance. The Corporate plan includes custom configuration, data migration and dedicated onboarding.

pillars.title: Built different. Built for Bulgaria.
pillars.sub: Four capabilities that set SDM apart from legacy desktop systems and international SaaS tools.

1.label: Compliance
1.title: NAS & NRA — built in, not bolted on
1.desc: The chart of accounts follows NAS. VAT journals are generated in the correct NRA format. VIES declaration is produced automatically. Zero configuration required — it works correctly from day one.

2.label: Pricing
2.title: One fixed fee for all your client firms
2.desc: Competitors charge per user or per company. The SDM Business plan covers up to five client firms at a single monthly rate — your revenue grows without your software bill growing with it.

3.label: Automation
3.title: From invoice to general ledger in seconds
3.desc: Every invoice posts directly to the sales journal and general ledger the moment it is issued. No exports, no manual entries, no reconciliation headaches at month-end.

4.label: Infrastructure
4.title: EU cloud with full audit traceability
4.desc: No installation. No local backups. Data stored in European infrastructure, fully GDPR compliant. Every action is logged with the user, timestamp and IP address — always.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.sub: 90 days free. No credit card. NRA-ready from the day you register.

sol.sub: Full accounting, invoicing and financial management functionality — in one unified workspace.

avail.title: Active Modules
avail.sub: Ready to use from day one. Built to Bulgaria's National Accounting Standards.

m1.title: Invoicing & Payments
m1.desc: Issue invoices and pro forma invoices in seconds — with automatic numbering, correct VAT and a direct link to the accounting journal. Pro forma converts to final invoice with one click. Supports BGN, EUR and any other currency.
m1.benefit: No double-entry. Every invoice posts directly to the sales journal.

m2.title: Receivables & Payables
m2.desc: Track overdue balances, manage due dates, maintain complete sales and purchase journals. Automatic marking of overdue items. Full history per client and supplier.
m2.benefit: See who owes what and when — no Excel reports needed.

m3.title: General Ledger & Chart of Accounts
m3.desc: Full double-entry bookkeeping with a configurable chart of accounts aligned to NAS and IFRS. Pre-structured by NAS groups 1–9. Import your own or configure from scratch.
m3.benefit: Every transaction posts automatically to the right accounts.

m4.title: Bank & Cash
m4.desc: Upload bank statements in CSV or XML format and the system matches transactions to recorded operations. Multiple bank accounts and cash registers in one workspace. Generate XML payment orders.
m4.benefit: Multiple accounts and cash registers — one workspace.

m5.title: VAT Reporting
m5.desc: Automatic VAT sales and purchase journals. VAT return and VIES declaration ready for NRA submission. Generated from invoice data — no manual input.
m5.benefit: VAT for all clients in one place, no tool switching.

m6.title: Administrative Console
m6.desc: Manage multiple companies with roles, permissions and financial year configuration. Add a new client in minutes. Switch between clients without logging out. Every action recorded with user and time.
m6.benefit: Switch between clients without logging out. Every action recorded.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Modules
upcoming.sub: Available automatically when released — no additional setup or migration needed.

1.title: Automatic Bank Reconciliation
1.desc: Direct bank connection via open banking. Transactions reconciled automatically by rules.

2.title: Fixed Assets & Depreciation
2.desc: Asset register with automatic depreciation calculation. Straight-line, declining balance, units-of-production methods.

3.title: Payroll
3.desc: Salary calculations, pay slips, Form 1 and Form 6 declarations, batch transfer to the NRA.

4.title: Inventory Management
4.desc: Stock tracking, goods receipts and inventory valuation integrated with the general ledger. FIFO or weighted average cost.

5.title: OCR Document Recognition
5.desc: AI reads purchase invoices and generates accounting entries. Photograph or upload a PDF — the system does the rest.

6.title: API & Integrations
6.desc: REST API for connecting with ERP systems, online stores, banking systems and internal tools.

pricing.title: Clear plans. Predictable pricing.
pricing.sub: Four plans built around the level of automation your business actually needs. All include a 90-day free trial. No credit card.

3.name: Business
3.limit: Up to 5 companies · 5 users/company · Unlimited invoices

cta.title: Interested? Get in touch.
cta.sub: We'll walk you through the platform, answer your questions and suggest the plan that fits your needs. 90-day free trial — no credit card.

about.sub: We built the tool we wished existed — a modern cloud accounting platform, written by accountants for accountants.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Smart Data Management was born from a real problem: accounting firms in Bulgaria rely on outdated desktop systems requiring local installation and IT support, or on international cloud tools not adapted for NAS and NRA formats.
story.p2: We decided to build something better — a cloud platform where the chart of accounts follows NAS, VAT journals are in the correct NRA format and VIES is built in. No configuration. Works correctly from day one.
story.p3: Today SDM serves accounting firms and businesses across Bulgaria, with data stored in European infrastructure, fully GDPR compliant.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.desc: To make modern, compliant accounting accessible to every company in Bulgaria — regardless of size — through a platform built by practising accountants.

1.title: Accuracy above all
1.desc: Accounting demands precision. Every module is built to work correctly from day one — not approximately, but exactly.

2.title: Local compliance
2.desc: We are built specifically for Bulgaria. NAS, VAT, NRA — not as an add-on, but as the foundation of the platform.

3.title: Scale without complexity
3.desc: Our clients must be able to grow without increasing the cost or complexity of their tools.

team.title: The team
team.desc: The SDM team consists of developers, accountants and consultants with many years of experience in Bulgaria's financial sector.

contact.sub: Have questions? Want to request a demo? We're ready to help.
